dialogue_line_replacements.text: Ojalá que los gobiernos inviertan más en energías renovables, especialmente en solar y eólica.
dialogue_line_replacements.translation: I hope governments invest more in renewable energy, especially solar and wind. (Spain leads in wind/solar)

dialogue_line_replacements.text: Exacto. Reciclar, usar transporte público y reducir el consumo de carne ya es un comienzo real.
dialogue_line_replacements.translation: Exactly. Recycling, using public transport and reducing meat consumption is already a real start.

cultural_notes_overrides.formality: Spain is a European leader in renewable energy (wind and solar) and takes environmental issues seriously in public discourse. EU climate policy is a major topic in Spanish daily news.
cultural_notes_overrides.regional_variations: Spain uses 'el reciclaje' and 'los contenedores' (recycling bins by color). 'El punto limpio' is a recycling drop-off center. Spain has strict EU environmental regulations that are frequently discussed in media.
